ops.body: Sweep executed 2026-07-10 (workflow wf_111ab4e2-180, 21 agents, zero errors): 5 GREEN (cc-factory a664947a, cc-pane 82d8a0d4, cc-merge f5573e25, cc-present 7c4eff3d, synckit b8f003c — settings now rendered from cc-skills:settings-base [+layer] + settings-overrides residue, lock-registered, Guides checks green, diffs reorder-only). 16 BLOCKED by the equivalence gate, all in the same direction: their committed settings LACK entries the pack base carries (typically enabledPlugins slop-cop/llm-prompts/writing-docs + cc-notes marketplace/plugin + env.TY_CONFIG_FILE + newer permissions.allow entries) — union-merge cannot remove, so strict no-behavior-change migration is impossible. These are STALE-template repos, not intentional divergence — except captain-hook, whose settings deliberately swap every hook command to the local-checkout launcher (capt-hook dev repo) and slim the pack blocks; it must never converge onto uvx hooks. Pending user decision: converge the 15 stale repos onto canonical base (gains them the newer plugins/allows — the actual point of fleet-managed settings) vs leave unmigrated vs slim the pack base. Full per-repo blocker lists in the workflow journal (wf_111ab4e2-180/journal.jsonl).
